OmniScript.description: Omniscript to capture Drinking Water Construction Permit from operator portal
OmniScript.name: PHOCS Drinking Water Treatment Facilities

omniProcessElements.name: DataMapperExtractAction1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "bundle" : "getDSWRelatedTreatmentFacilities", "ignoreCache" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "SelectedDWSAccountId", "inputParam" : "SelectedDWSAccountId" } ], "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: SetValues1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "SetValues1", "elementValueMap" : { "SelectedDWSAccountId" : "001bZ00000G23dJQAR" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }
